# Tamorsenasiaa

*A world generated by Cartogenesis v0.12.0 from seed `mistral`. Regenerate it exactly with `node src/cli.ts generate --seed mistral`.*

## Overview

- **Extent:** 360 × 360 cells
- **Land / ocean:** 46.3% land, 53.7% ocean, 1 lake(s)
- **Climate & life:** dominant biome **Grassland**, 16 biomes in all
- **Peoples:** 27 regions, 19 settlements, 3 realms
- **Capital:** Nasida, seat of House Ghairaru
- **Dominant power:** Tamorsenasiaa (of 5 surviving realm(s))
- **The present year:** 961 After Reckoning
- **Highest peak:** 4,500 m · **volcanoes:** 7 (1 active)

## Volcanoes

- **Mount Fjahreihruheim** — stratovolcano, dormant, summit 4,500 m

## Notable features

- **Mount Mausiassoau** — the highest peak
- **The Vintememorbe** — the greatest river
- **Lake Rabolenre** — the largest inland water

- Shezkai is an inland reach of dry basin country, its people caravan-traders and readers of stars.

## Notable figures

- **Licemorlivento, the General** — Licemorlivento broke the long siege of Mamuesh.
- **Bemaa, the Mountaineer** — Bemaa was first to stand atop Mausiassoau and return alive.
- **Meovemorba, the Explorer** — Meovemorba charted the far coasts and traced the Vintememorbe to its source.
- **Oleriamo, the Scholar** — Oleriamo mapped the waters of Rabolenre.
- **Mauciareo, the Architect** — Mauciareo raised the great road between Nasida and Aamaur.

## Faiths

### the Faith of Rajaa — Rajaa, god of the Forest

> Rajaa planted the first tree in Shezkai and hides still among the deep woods.

Followed across 16 region(s).

### the Way of Hrobu — Hrobu, god of the Storm

> Hrobu rides the storms down the Vintememorbe, and Hryfjo both fears and blesses the rain.

Followed across 5 region(s).

### the Way of Dariamiabau — Dariamiabau, god of War

> Dariamiabau forged the first blade in the fires of Mausiassoau and gave it to the bold of Sodeoe.

Followed across 6 region(s).

## Resources & trade

- **Major exports:** Livestock, Grain, Horses, Wine, Fish
- **Wealthiest settlement:** Mamuesh
- **Trade hubs:** Nasida, Mamuesh, Shaaqqaa
- **Deposits:** Iron ×33, Copper ×25, Gold ×11, Gems ×7, Stone ×68, Coal ×28, Timber ×7, Grain ×42, Livestock ×122, Fish ×11, Furs ×5, Spices ×1, Salt ×10, Horses ×35, Wine ×21

## Legends of the founding age

- **41 After Reckoning** — The city of Nasida was founded on a sheltered harbour, destined to become the seat of power.
- **62 After Reckoning** — Nasida rose to rule its hinterland, and the realm of Tamorsenasiaa was proclaimed.
- **65 After Reckoning** — The city of Aamaur was founded on a sheltered harbour.
- **75 After Reckoning** — The city of Mamuesh was founded on a sheltered harbour.
- **104 After Reckoning** — Aamaur rose to rule its hinterland, and the realm of Edshiesh was proclaimed.
- **109 After Reckoning** — Mamuesh rose to rule its hinterland, and the realm of Makhzaur was proclaimed.
- **340 After Reckoning** — Over control of the Mausiassoau passes, Edshiesh and Makhzaur went to war; the war ended in exhausted stalemate, and the border with Makhzaur was fixed.
- **618 After Reckoning** — Mausiassoau woke in fire and ash; a hard winter followed, and harvests failed across the land.
- **633 After Reckoning** — An academy founded on the shores of Rabolenre gathered the age's finest cartographers.
- **853 After Reckoning** — A great storm-tide flooded Nasida; the lower quarters were lost to the sea.
- **928 After Reckoning** — Under a long peace, Nasida flourished; its libraries and roads became the wonder of the world.

## Heightmap

A real 360×360 16-bit heightmap is exported alongside this report (`.heightmap16.png` and raw `.heightmap.r16`). Import it into Blender, Unity, Godot, or World Machine and scale the height to **4,500 m** (value 65535 = 4,500 m above the lowest point). The topographic contour map (`.topo.png`) shows the same relief as isolines.
